## What this does

Brief description of the change and the "why".

## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check walkingdev scripts tests` passes
- [ ] `pytest -q` passes (and new behavior is covered by a test)
- [ ] No personal data added to source or example configs
- [ ] Heavy imports stay lazy; new config keys documented in `config.example.yaml` / `.env.example`
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or setup changed
